observations: runx-cli 0.6.14 was used for publish, registry read, clean install, local harness, installed-package harness, post-publish dogfood, and verify.
GitHub identity RYDE-PLAY/ryde-play was verified before pushing source revision 9d08a5e66ae4b8115718a907940b497c6f9a1bda.
The exact registry package is ryde-play/rollback-judge@sha-37688e7136f0 with publisher owner ryde-play.
PR 277 now changes only six files under skills/rollback-judge; runtime crate and OFFICIAL_SKILLS changes are absent from the PR file list.
The post-publish dogfood did not read fixtures/critical-signal.json and did not accept act_decision or act_target_ref from the caller.
At execution time the default judge fetched GitHub Actions run 29393017505 and its marker pinned to commit d118cae3bfbe30e1d65d021f8b3ae163166e6041.
The live current deploy signal is severity critical, kind error_rate_spike: workflow conclusion failure and http_5xx_rate 18.4% exceeded the 2% threshold over 15m.
The judge separately fetched successful run 29392993457 and its marker pinned to commit ab4d82d0f136bd4e5d3d9c7b2e1811e9a17005c9.
The prior target was derived from that source as version 2026.07.15.3 with http_5xx_rate 0.4%, below the 2% threshold.
The dogfood decision is action rollback, reason error_rate_critical, version target 2026.07.15.3, with no escalation required.
release.publish.approval output contains approved=true and reason=error_rate_critical and names release as the downstream owner; rollback-judge executed no deploy effect.
The sealed review act targets the real failing Actions run and carries the derived runx:release:rollback-judge-demo@2026.07.15.3 artifact ref.
A separate negative execution against successful run 29392993457 returned hold with refused/escalated reason nonfailing_signal and approval=false.
Harness cases are critical-signal-rollback=sealed and signal-contradictory-block=needs_agent; local and clean installed-package harnesses both passed 2/2.
runx verify returned valid=true, signature.status=valid, signature.mode=production, and no findings.

commands.dogfood: runx skill ryde-play/rollback-judge@sha-37688e7136f0 --registry https://api.runx.ai --json --input-json deploy_signal='{"severity":"critical","kind":"error_rate_spike","evidence":{"source_type":"github_actions_run","source_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/RYDE-PLAY/frantic-102-rollback-judge/actions/runs/29393017505","workflow_name":"Rollback Judge Deployment Monitor"}}' --input-json current_version='{"service":"rollback-judge-demo","marker_path":"public/deploy-target.json","source_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/RYDE-PLAY/frantic-102-rollback-judge/actions/runs/29393017505"}' --input monitor_run_ref=https://github.com/RYDE-PLAY/frantic-102-rollback-judge/actions/runs/29393017505 --input-json prior_version='{"service":"rollback-judge-demo","marker_path":"public/deploy-target.json","source_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/RYDE-PLAY/frantic-102-rollback-judge/actions/runs/29392993457"}' --input-json forward_fix_evidence='{"test_runs":[],"review_signoff":null}'

dogfood.command: runx skill ryde-play/rollback-judge@sha-37688e7136f0 --registry https://api.runx.ai --json <the live input arguments recorded in commands.dogfood>

summary: Revision publishes ryde-play/rollback-judge@sha-37688e7136f0 and dogfoods its default judge against real public GitHub Actions monitor runs. The sealed receipt records the failing run, error_rate_critical rollback decision, and source-derived prior version without caller-supplied decision or release target fields.
